headline: NRG Energy, Inc. Announces Cash Tender Offer and Consent Solicitation for any and all of Lightning Power, LLC’s outstanding 7.250% Senior Secured Notes due 2032
summary: HOUSTON, April 14, 2026--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) announced today that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Lightning Power, LLC ("Lightning"), has commenced an offer to purchase for cash (the "Tender Offer") any and all of Lightning’s outstanding 7.250% senior secured notes due 2032 (the "Notes"), of which $1,500 million aggregate principal amount is currently outstanding.

headline: NRG Energy, Inc. Announces Offerings of Senior Secured Notes and Senior Unsecured Notes
summary: HOUSTON, April 14, 2026--NRG Energy, Inc.
